title: cyclosorus caroli
intro: Cyclosorus caroli, also known as the Carol's fern or Christmas fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus caroli can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to create traditional remedies in Asian folk medicine.
